summary: Tested new destination panel feature on mobile. All critical UI elements working correctly. Fixed 2 missing translations (common.destinationSet, common.subscribed) in fr.json and en.json.
passed_tests: Important popup closes with 'J'ai compris' button - SUCCESS
'Définir destination' button visible on dashboard - SUCCESS
Address search panel opens on click - SUCCESS
Address search works (typed 'Gare du Nord') - SUCCESS
Address suggestions appear and are clickable - SUCCESS
Selecting address closes search panel - SUCCESS
'Rechercher les véhicules' button visible and clickable - SUCCESS
Route info displayed (2.84 km, 1 transfer, 16 min) - SUCCESS
'Aucun véhicule disponible' message shows when no drivers online - SUCCESS
context_for_next_testing_agent: New destination panel feature tested and working. Missing translations fixed (common.destinationSet, common.subscribed). No drivers were online during testing so 'Aucun véhicule disponible' message was displayed - this is expected behavior. To test driver selection flow, a driver needs to be online.

fixes_applied.fix: Added missing translations: common.destinationSet='Destination définie', common.subscribed='Abonné'
Added missing translations: common.destinationSet='Destination set', common.subscribed='Subscribed'

destination_panel.flow: Set destination -> Search address -> Select -> Panel appears -> Search vehicles -> Results/No vehicles message
